daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic today, Gemini. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to lean into your natural curiosity and let yourself be a little more vulnerable with people around you. Trust the flow.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your energy shift. Whether you're single or coupled up, today invites authentic conversations. Skip the surface-level banter and actually say what's on your mind—it lands differently right now.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. Channel that restless mental energy into one solid project instead of scattering yourself. Your collaboration skills are your superpower; use them strategically.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and play, not punishment. Do something that makes you feel alive—a walk, dancing, stretching. Hydrate extra and notice how good it feels to actually listen to yourself.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini. Your mind is sharper than usual, but don't forget to actually listen instead of just waiting to talk. There's magic in the pauses.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, someone's noticing your energy. If you're in something, vulnerability hits different right now. Single? Stop overthinking and let yourself be a little messy.
weekly.career: Your ideas are genuinely good this week—the kind that make people go 'wait, actually.' Channel that into projects that matter to you. Collaboration flows better than going solo.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's been working overtime. Lean into grounding stuff: walks, tea, touch grass literally. Your body's asking you to slow down and you should probably listen.
